title: genista sylvestris subsp. innocua
intro: Genista sylvestris subsp. innocua, also known as Spiny broom or Mountain broom, is a sub-species of the Genista sylvestris plant, a type of flowering shrub native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Genista sylvestris subsp. innocua include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
